title: Standard proof envelope with IANA-registerable content type
description: Define `application/bolyra-proof+cbor` as the canonical wire format for transmitting proofs between services. The envelope wraps proof bytes, public signals, circuit identifier, proving system (groth16/plonk), and an optional delegation chain array — everything a verifier needs in a single self-describing payload. Add `ProofEnvelope.encode()` and `ProofEnvelope.decode()` to both TS and Python SDKs. Without a standard envelope, every framework integration (LangChain, CrewAI, MCP) invents its own serialization, creating an interop nightmare as the ecosystem grows.
